questions.question: Explain the difference between SIGTERM and SIGKILL signals.
expectedPoints: SIGTERM can be caught and handled gracefully
SIGKILL cannot be caught, blocked, or ignored
SIGTERM allows process cleanup before termination

questions.question: Describe the signal handling process from generation to handling, including the role of the signal mask.
expectedPoints: Role of signal mask in blocking signals
Signal handler invocation if not blocked
